🫐 **Introducing ****@ChosicBot****, your ultimate music companion**

📮 Finding your next **favorite track** is just a message away. Whether you know the **exact track** or **artist** you're craving, have a **spotify playlist** you can't get enough of, or simply want to explore a specific **genre**, **Chosic has got you covered!**

**💡 How To Use:**
    __- Send me any query
    - Use __`/recommend query`__ in groups
    - Type __`@ChosicBot help`__ for inline help__

**⚙️ Supported queries:**
    __- Song name/spotify link
    - Artist name/spotify link
    - Playlist spotify link
    - Genre name__

Telejet 1.1.0 version 🚀

Anonymous Browsing 

is a way you can control your privacy on Telejet.
You can use Anonymous Browsing when you want to browse the Telejet mobile app without associating your Telegram account.

Fully support features:

- Switching between accounts (anonymous and authorized)
- Searching in the community's catalog
- Joining communities
- Making your anonymous home feed

In addition, any features or actions that are tied to your account won’t be available while using Anonymous Browsing, including:

- Posting or commenting 
- Upvoting and downvoting 
- Chat and messaging (coming soon) ❤️

📧 **Temp Mails Online**
__
1. TempMail:
   - URL: __https://temp-mail.org/__
   - Description: Disposable email for temporary use, keeping personal email private.

2. Guerrilla Mail:
   - URL: __https://www.guerrillamail.com/__
   - Description: Anonymous, self-destructing email addresses for privacy online.

3. 10 Minute Mail:
   - URL: __https://10minutemail.com/__
   - Description: Temporary email addresses that expire in 10 minutes for quick and secure use.

4. Mailinator:
   - URL: __https://www.mailinator.com/__
   - Description: Publicly accessible inboxes for receiving temporary emails without an account.

5. YOPmail:
   - URL: __http://www.yopmail.com/__
   - Description: Quick and easy disposable email addresses for temporary communication.__

😀 **Introducing the ****@EternalGitaBot****!**

☄️ Embark on a spiritual journey with daily sloks from the sacred book Shrimad Bhagavad Gita.

📌 **Two Modes:**
   1. Random Mode: Receive a random slok every day.
   2. Series Mode: Receive sloks in sequential order.

🔔 **To set your preference, use the command:** `/cast`

🖥 **Other Commands:**
   - `/read` : Read the last left slok.
   - `/slok` : Get a random slok or specify a chapter and verse.
   - `/chapter` : Retrieve information about a specific chapter.
   - `/help` : Display available commands.
[ㅤ](https://telegra.ph/file/bc8c8fdf96750fdb62c37.jpg)
⭐️ __Enjoy your spiritual journey with __[__Shrimad Bhagavad Gita Bot!__](http://t.me/EternalGitaBot)

Greetings, for the second day in a row, Telegram has been causing us headaches. Yesterday, we experienced constant connection disruptions with Telegram, and today's update has thrown a wrench into the works, breaking part of the bot API – specifically, the ability to send messages to channels.

As a result, for the past two days, DeezLoad has been struggling, and our download speeds have taken a nosedive. We can't load hundreds of songs simultaneously under these circumstances.

DEDSEC stands vigilant, ready to overcome any obstacle in our path. Stay strong, fellows, for our mission endures!

فيلم درامي قصير شهواني ألماني انتاج 2011 ، كتبه وأخرجه سيرجيه مويا. عن حياة أمّ عزباء في برلين تحاول إدارة حياتها بموازنة ابنها الصغير بعناية ، لكنها تواجه صعوبات وتنسى احتياجاتها الشخصية تقريبًا أثناء إدارة عواقب حياتها الخاصة.

رابط المشاهدة :https://lbx.to/s/vgvLkRr?dirId=798656

In the new version v 1.0.21 of the [Telejet](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.telejet.app) application, we have added support for vertical full-screen videos:
1. The video will fill the common post area.
2. Added video controls ⏯
3. Added volume controls 🎶

In the new version of the application, we have made a test version of the Telegram channel catalog. 

Each user will be able to recommend their channels in future. 😌

‏ترجم أي مقطع فيديو من أي لغة إلى أي لغة في ثواني، وباحترافية في إظهار الترجمة الي تظهر أسفل الفيديو لتكون مثل ترجمة الأفلام ونحوها!
كل الي عليك تعمله ترفع أي فيديو على الخدمة، وهو بيتعرف على لغته ولهجته، وعليك فقط تختار الترجمة إلى أي لغة تريد!

‏خدمة مفيدة:
إذا كان عندك كلمة تلقيها في أي مكان أو نص تقرأه وتريد قياس الوقت الذي ستستغرقه هذه الكلمة؛ فهذه خدمة مفيدة تقيس لك الوقت لقراءة النص كاملاً!
فقط ألصق النص في الصفحة وسيظهر لك في اليسار مدة قراءته، ويمكنك تغيير مقياس الوقت حسب سرعة قراءتك
